hero_subtitle: Welcome to the office of Dr. Soo B Kim, DDS – serving Paramus and Bergen County for over 20 years.
quality_care_title:
Quality Dental Care.
Skilled Professionals.
Warm Welcoming Atmosphere.
about_text: At Kim Dental, you're not just a patient. You are part of our extended family. From the moment you walk through our doors, our caring team is here to listen, understand your needs, and provide gentle, personalized care tailored just for you. Whether it's a routine checkup, a smile makeover, or advanced dental treatment, we offer a full range of services in a welcoming, relaxed environment designed for your comfort. Dr. Kim's philosophy is simple. Treat every patient with the same kindness, respect, and attention he would give his own loved ones. Your health, your comfort, and your smile are at the heart of everything we do, and we're honored to help you achieve a lifetime of confident, healthy teeth.
testimonial_1_text: Love this dentist. Staff and doctor are great, helpful and put me at ease. Definitely recommend!
testimonial_2_text: Office is very clean and well maintained... He was very gentle I did not even feel any pinch... I highly recommend his practice.
testimonial_3_text: Great dentist. Professional and courteous. Bilingual fluent Korean and English speaking. Charming staff. Best of all, quality dental work.
service_general_dentistry_desc: Comprehensive exams, preventive care, fillings, and more.
service_hygiene_desc: Gentle professional cleanings for all ages.
service_implants_desc: Restore your smile with advanced dental implants.
service_removable_prosthetics_desc: Full or partial dentures, custom-fit for comfort and confidence.
dr_kim_bio: Dr. Soo Bum Kim is a highly experienced and compassionate dentist who has been proudly serving the Bergen County community for over two decades. Known for his gentle demeanor, attention to detail, and personalized care, Dr. Kim strives to make every patient feel at ease.
our_office_p1: For over 20 years, we've been dedicated to providing exceptional dental care that combines clinical expertise with genuine compassion. We believe the best dentistry comes from blending advanced technology with personal attention, skilled precision with gentle care, and professional excellence with a warm, welcoming atmosphere where you truly feel at home.
our_office_p2: We've thoughtfully designed every detail of your visit to feel effortless, from our comfortable reception area to our state-of-the-art treatment rooms—so we can focus on what matters most: you and your smile. Whether you're here for a routine cleaning or a complex procedure, you'll receive personalized, clear care from a team that takes the time to listen and treats you like family.
about_p1: Dr. Soo Bum Kim is a highly experienced and compassionate dentist who has been proudly serving the Bergen County community for over two decades. He earned his Doctor of Dental Surgery (DDS) degree from the University at Buffalo School of Dental Medicine in 1998. Following dental school, Dr. Kim completed his residency at Staten Island University Hospital, where he gained hands-on experience in emergency dentistry and trauma care.
about_p2: In 2001, Dr. Kim opened his private practice in Paramus, New Jersey, where he has been dedicated to providing high-quality, patient-centered dental care ever since. His clinical expertise includes general dentistry, root canal therapy, cosmetic procedures, and a strong focus on implant surgery. He has completed over 500 hours of advanced continuing education in implant dentistry through the prestigious Hiossen Implant program.
about_p3: As an active member of the Korean Dental Association, Dr. Kim remains deeply engaged with the dental community and is constantly striving to enhance his skills. Known for his gentle demeanor, attention to detail, and personalized care, Dr. Kim strives to make every patient feel at ease. He takes the time to listen, educate, and work collaboratively to create healthy, beautiful smiles that last a lifetime.
about_p4: Outside the office, Dr. Kim enjoys spending time with his family and is proud to be an active member of the Paramus community.
about_team_desc: Our friendly and professional staff, including experienced dental assistants and hygienists, are dedicated to making your visit comfortable and stress-free.
about_daniel_p1: Dr. Daniel Kim is a proud Paramus native who grew up right here in the community and attended the local public schools. He graduated from Paramus High School in 2016 and went on to earn his Bachelor's Degree in Microbiology from Penn State University. He went on to receive his Doctor of Dental Medicine (DMD) degree from Boston University, graduating cum laude.
about_daniel_p2: After dental school, he completed a 1-year general practice residency at Central Jersey Medical Center focusing on general dentistry. Inspired by his father's work, Dr. Kim Jr. has a passion for continuing the family tradition of caring for patients with excellence and compassion.
about_daniel_p3: He has a special interest in digital dentistry and uses advanced technology to make treatments more precise, comfortable, and efficient. Dr. Kim is committed to helping every patient achieve a healthy, confident smile and continually keeps up with the latest dental techniques to provide the best care possible.
